title: STATUS Monoxide Alarm, Home Carbon Monoxide Detector including Batteries, SDCMA2XAA1PB4
features: CARBON MONOXIDE DETECTION: Effectively detects carbon monoxide (CO) gas, providing early warning and protection against this silent and deadly threat in the home.
BATTERY-POWERED: Comes with batteries included, ensuring immediate functionality upon installation, without the need for external power sources.
EASY INSTALLATION: Simple to install, requiring no wiring, allowing for hassle-free setup and placement in various areas of the home for optimal coverage.
RELIABLE ALERT SYSTEM: Equipped with a reliable alert system, emitting loud alarms upon detecting dangerous levels of carbon monoxide, ensuring prompt evacuation and action.
HOME SAFETY ESSENTIAL: A crucial addition to any home safety toolkit, providing peace of mind and protection for occupants against the dangers of carbon monoxide poisoning.
description: Product Description Carbon Monoxide Alarm - 2 x AA - White - Status - Digital - 1 pk Box Manufacturer Contact Information Status International (UK) Ltd, Unit 1, Whitehall 26 Business Park, Heathfield Lane, Birkenshaw, Bradford, BD11 2HW.
